ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement category (e.g., Circumferences, Lengths) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the measurement category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES measurement_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender of the customer */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the customer */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer's measurements were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer's measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer's measurement was taken */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer who took the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the designer (e.g., pattern maker, stylist) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the designer's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design project */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer leading the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the design project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_projects_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_measurements" (
  "project_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project's measurement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design project */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement used */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_measurements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES design_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer accessing the data */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the design project for which the report was generated */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., size chart, pattern design) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES design_projects ("project_id")
)
